phase transition into a risk on market
regime, you don't know if the market has
bottomed or not. You don't know if the
bear market is over. You just know that
we're now in a risk on market regime. It
could be

market. You don't know. We never know ex
ante. It's impossible to know ex ante
whether this is a you know, two-month
bounce or two-quarter bounce in a bear
market and and we're going to go back to
the bear market, or this is the new bull
market. You don't know. And so, it
behooves you to try to stay on the right
side of market risk by responding to
that change with getting covering shorts
and getting longer in your portfolio.

and you didn't get longer, then now
